Session 1 	Session 2 	Session 3 	Session 4 	Session 5 	Session 6
In this training you are going to work with Ryan, Dean's very own Facebook Ads manager and you will discover how to get started with Facebook
ads and why it is the quickest way to scale a small group, workshop or mastermind. This will be a very powerful training for those wanting and
willing to run ads to your event!
S E S S I O N O V E R V I E W
TAKE NOTES
ACTION STEPS
Create a Facebook ad account from your personal Facebook age
Think through possible ad angles you could use to drive people to your event landing page.
Think through unique videos you could film to get traffic from Facebook
Think through unique copy you could write for your ads.
Remember Facebook ads are not a get rich over night process. It takes time. But once mastered, can unlock massive success in
your offer.
